info.title: BaseMouse API
info.description: Context infrastructure for AI agents: import your docs, pull cited, checksummed context packs, audit the append-only record. Authenticate with `Authorization: Bearer bm_...`; anonymous reads see the public demo corpus. An MCP endpoint exposing the same tools lives at POST /mcp (JSON-RPC, Streamable HTTP, stateless).

get.description: Process-only liveness (never touches the database). Also reports billing/meshai enablement and a non-secret license object. The license key value is server-only and never appears here.

license.description: Non-secret license posture. Never includes the license key.

licensed.description: whether a license key is present (presence only)

get.summary: Ranked search over your visible workspaces (lexical or hybrid)
get.description: retrieval=lexical (default) ranks by term overlap. retrieval=hybrid combines three signals: lexical anchors, one hop of graph expansion along document links, and a local vector signal. The vector signal uses BaseMouse's built-in offline hashed-feature embeddings (no external vector DB, no paid embedding API, no network) — disable it with BASEMOUSE_VECTOR_RETRIEVAL=off, leaving graph+lexical hybrid. Each result carries a `retrieval` block ({ mode, signals: array of 'lexical'/'vector'/'graph', reasons: array of human-readable strings, sourceScores: per-signal score map }). When the vector signal is active the response also includes a top-level `vector` block ({ backend: 'local-hashed', dimensions }).

parameters.name: retrieval
parameters.description: Ranking mode. 'lexical' (default) is term-overlap ranking; 'hybrid' adds one-hop graph expansion plus a local hashed-vector signal, with per-result signal explanations. Vectors are local/offline, not a paid embedding API or external vector DB.

200.description: Echoes retrieval mode; matches with scores and matchedTerms (plus a per-result retrieval block and a top-level vector backend block when retrieval=hybrid with local vectors enabled)

get.description: Authenticated pulls count against the plan's monthly quota. The response carries X-BaseMouse-Pack-Checksum (sha-256 of the pack, first 16 hex chars). X-BaseMouse-Degraded: true marks demo-fallback corpus during a store outage. retrieval=hybrid combines lexical anchors, one-hop graph expansion, and a local offline vector signal: the pack echoes a top-level `retrieval` summary ({ mode, signals, weights, vector }) and every entry carries a `retrieval` block ({ mode, signals, reasons, sourceScores }) — signals can include 'lexical', 'vector', and 'graph'. The vector signal uses built-in hashed-feature embeddings (no external vector DB, no paid embedding API, no network) and is reported under `retrieval.vector` ({ backend: 'local-hashed', dimensions }); disable it with BASEMOUSE_VECTOR_RETRIEVAL=off.

parameters.name: retrieval
parameters.description: Ranking mode. 'lexical' (default) or 'hybrid' (one-hop graph expansion + local hashed-vector signal, with signal explanations). Vectors are local/offline, not a paid embedding API or external vector DB.

200.description: context_pack.v1 (top-level retrieval summary with vector backend when retrieval=hybrid; every entry carries a retrieval block, with vector/graph signals when retrieval=hybrid)

post.summary: Create a document in your workspace

201.description: created (version 1, or resurrected tombstone with continued version)

put.description: Requires expectedVersion (body) or If-Match (header) equal to the current version.

200.description: tombstoned; frees document quota; storage/history retained
every revision incl. tombstones, with snapshots

get.summary: Plan, documents, pack pulls, storage vs limits

200.description: quota state — see it before a 402, not from it

post.summary: Exchange a paid Stripe checkout session for an API key (shown exactly once)
Rotate your key (old key dies immediately, new shown once)
Stripe-hosted Billing Portal session (cancel, payment management)

post.description: Methods: initialize, tools/list, tools/call. Tools: search, get_context_pack. Same auth and metering as REST.
